label: War in Afghanistan (2001–2021)
info: Authorized by AUMF S.J.Res. 23 (Sept 18, 2001). Passed Senate 98-0. Cost: $2.3 trillion. 2,448 US military deaths. Last major US combat troops left Aug 2021.

label: Iraq War (2003–2011)
info: Authorized by AUMF H.J.Res. 114 (Oct 11, 2002). Passed Senate 77-23. Cost: $2.2 trillion total. 4,431 US military deaths. Based on false WMD claims.

label: PNAC Blueprint (1997)
info: Project for the New American Century. Founded by William Kristol and Robert Kagan. 'Rebuilding America's Defenses' (2000) called for regime change in Iraq years before 9/11. Members later served in Bush administration.

label: Libya Intervention (2011)
info: US-led NATO intervention under Obama. No formal AUMF passed. Cost: ~$1B. Destabilized region led to ongoing civil war.

label: Syria Conflict (2014–Present)
info: US involvement including strikes under 2001 AUMF authorization. ISIS campaign + Turkish border tensions. Ongoing as of 2026.

label: Ukraine Aid (2022–Present)
info: US military aid: $65B+ from 2022-2025. Massive windfall for Lockheed Martin, Raytheon (HIMARS, Patriot, ATACMS). Senate passed Ukraine supplemental 79-18 (April 2024).

label: Gaza & Israel Aid (2023–Present)
info: US military aid to Israel: $18B+ in year after Oct 7, 2023. Annual baseline: $3.8B. Weapons: JDAM bombs (Boeing), artillery, iron dome interceptors (RTX). Senate passed $26B package April 2024.

label: AUMF 2001 (Afghanistan)
info: Authorization for Use of Military Force. S.J.Res. 23. Passed 98-0. Still legally in effect as of 2026, used to justify anti-ISIS operations in Syria.

label: AUMF 2002 (Iraq)
info: Authorization for Use of Military Force Against Iraq. H.J.Res. 114. Passed Senate 77-23. Repealed by Senate in 2024. The foundational 'Hawk' vote.
